errors.reward: Unable to award points right now.

landing.title: Create high-converting Instagram posts in minutes.
landing.copy: Postalia turns brand context into persuasive captions, carousel outlines, hashtags and image prompts for creators, freelancers, restaurants, agencies and small businesses.

feature1.title: Built from brand context
feature1.copy: Every post starts from your brand identity, audience and tone of voice.

feature2.title: Persuasive by design
feature2.copy: Generate captions and carousel ideas that support a clear objective and CTA.

feature3.title: Secure, simple and fast
feature3.copy: A SaaS layout that feels modern, professional and dependable from the first screen.

metric1.label: faster workflow
metric1.copy: Plan, write and export in one organized flow.

metric2.label: languages
metric2.copy: English, Spanish and Portuguese out of the box.

metric3.label: clear workflow
metric3.copy: Brand, template, generation, export and history.

trust.title: Designed to feel trustworthy
trust.copy: Calm layout, clear hierarchy, responsive cards and fast actions that keep the interface easy to use on desktop and mobile.

login.copy: Fast access for secure teams. Google login is always available, and email/password appears only when the backend allows local authentication.
login.feature1: Responsive layout with clear actions and no clutter.
login.feature2: JWT session flow with refresh token support.
login.cardSubtitle: Use Google or your local account, depending on configuration.
login.sessionInvalid: Your session expired or became invalid. Please sign in again.
login.googleOnly: Google-only mode is enabled. Email login is disabled by backend configuration.

register.title: Create your account
register.copy: Set up your workspace and start generating brand-aware Instagram content in a few minutes.
register.feature1: One brand setup wizard with automatic template creation.
register.feature2: Points wallet and subscription defaults ready on first login.
register.feature3: Safe by design with server-side permission checks.
register.cardSubtitle: Local registration is available only when Google-only mode is off.
register.googleOnly: Registration is disabled in Google-only mode.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple plans built for creators, teams and agencies. Start small and upgrade only when you need more capacity.
pricing.paymentsDisabled: Payments are not enabled yet. Paid plans are shown for reference only.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your plan, points and recent activity in a clean workspace built for speed.
dashboard.brandReady: Your default brand is ready for new post generation, templates and export.
dashboard.brandPrompt: Create your first brand to unlock generation and templates.
dashboard.organizedHistory: Everything stays organized in one private history.
dashboard.currentBrandPrompt: Create a brand profile to unlock structured generation.
dashboard.recentGenerationsSubtitle: Quick access to the latest content output.
dashboard.workspaceSubtitle: Useful details about your current setup.

wizard.title: Brand setup wizard
wizard.subtitle: Create a brand profile and let the backend generate the first reusable template automatically.
wizard.editSubtitle: Review and refine the existing brand profile. The name stays locked to protect links and prompt consistency.
wizard.editNotice: Brand name and slug are locked after creation.
wizard.websiteHint: Optional, but it must be a valid URL if provided. The site will be scanned for text, colors and visual context.
wizard.nameLockedHint: Brand name cannot be changed after creation.
wizard.primaryColorHint: Click to open the color palette and choose the main brand color.
wizard.secondaryColorHint: Click to open the color palette and choose the supporting brand color.
wizard.logoHint: Upload a square logo. It will be cropped automatically so the layout stays clean.
wizard.logoPreviewCopy: This is the cropped logo that will be saved with the brand.
wizard.previewSubtitle: A basic skeleton preview of how brand colors and text hierarchy will look in posts.
wizard.templateAutoCreated: The backend will create the initial BrandTemplate automatically when the brand is saved.
wizard.readyCopy: Your brand profile will be used as the context for captions, carousel structures and image prompts.
wizard.whySubtitle: A strong brand profile improves every generated post.
wizard.why2: Lets you reuse templates instead of rewriting them.
wizard.why3: Simplifies the generation flow on mobile.

profile.title: Brand profile
profile.subtitle: Review the brand identity that powers your generation prompts.
profile.brandListSubtitle: Select a brand card or open the editor to update details.
profile.emptyState: You do not have any brands yet. Create your first brand to start generating posts.
profile.websiteContextSubtitle: Captured from the brand website and reused in generation prompts.

preview.bullet2: Support blocks use the secondary color.

templates.title: Brand templates
templates.subtitle: Create reusable prompts, tone and style directions for each brand.
templates.addTemplateSubtitle: Start with a base prompt and refine it later.

generate.title: Generate post
generate.subtitle: Choose the brand, format and objective, then preview the cost before spending points.
generate.videoPending: Video generation is not available yet.
generate.detailsSubtitle: Inspect the exact inputs sent to the backend.
generate.previewSubtitle: The selected settings shape the prompt and output format.
generate.formatCopy: Choose a layout that fits feed, reels, story or carousel usage.
generate.styleCopy: Choose a visual direction that will be passed into the image prompt.
generate.generationCopy: Structured output is created by the backend and stored in history.
generate.resultSubtitle: Copy it, export it or open the image output.
generate.copyOrImage: Copy it, export it or open the image output.
generate.exportReadyCopy: The result panel will show the generated copy, structured JSON or image link after the first generation.
generate.previewing: Previewing the generation cost. Please wait.
generate.insufficientPreviewPoints: You need {points} more points to generate this post.
generate.blockedGeneric: Generation blocked. Check the reason shown by the backend.
generate.failedGeneric: Generation failed. Try again in a moment.
generate.blockedPlanLimitHint: Your points are still available. The block came from a plan rule, such as a daily or usage limit.
generate.blockedPointsHint: The block came from the points balance. Check your wallet before trying again.
generate.blockedBalanceCopy: Your balance is fine; the request was blocked by a plan or usage rule.
generate.blockedNoContentCopy: No final content was saved because the request was blocked by the backend.
generate.incompleteResultCopy: This request was blocked or failed, so no final content was generated.

history.title: Generated history
history.subtitle: Review previous generations and keep every output organized.
history.planAwareAdsSubtitle: Free users see ad placeholders by default.
history.detailsSubtitle: Inspect the exact inputs and output stored for this post.
history.caption: Caption
history.emptyImageCopy: This generation does not include an image preview.
history.noGenerationsCopy: Generate your first post to see it in a feed-style preview.

wallet.title: Points wallet
wallet.subtitle: Keep track of your balance, rewarded ads and the transactions that built your points.
wallet.balanceCopy: Every balance change is audited through credit transactions.
wallet.earnedPointsSubtitle: Watch a rewarded ad to earn points within your daily limit.
wallet.transactionsSubtitle: A chronological history of wallet updates.
wallet.rewardError: Unable to award points right now.

referrals.title: Referral program
referrals.subtitle: Share your code, grow the workspace and review the referrals you've already sent.
referrals.sentReferralsSubtitle: The referrals that have been linked to your account.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Review the active plan, limits, billing state and available upgrades.
subscription.availablePlansSubtitle: Upgrade or switch plans without losing your content.
subscription.pointsAndRewardsCopy: Rewarded ad points, login rewards and referral bonuses remain available across all plans. Paid plans change limits and remove page ads by default.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Review the current auth mode and account metadata.
settings.name: Name

billing.receivedSubtitle: Your subscription will be activated as soon as the confirmation webhook is processed.
billing.receivedCopy: Redirects from Creem are only a UX signal. The backend webhook is the source of truth for subscription activation.
billing.portalUnavailable: Billing portal is not available yet.
billing.canceledSubtitle: Your current plan has not changed.
billing.canceledCopy: You can return to pricing and try again later. No plan change was applied from the canceled checkout.

legal.title: Legal
legal.placeholderSubtitle: Placeholder legal copy for the MVP.
legal.termsCopy: This page is reserved for the final terms of use and will be expanded before production.
legal.privacyCopy: This page is reserved for the final privacy policy and will be expanded before production.

staff.title: Staff console
staff.subtitle: Internal operational summary for users, brands, generations and risk events.
staff.notesSubtitle: Keep this area for future staff-only controls.
staff.protectedSurfaceCopy: This console is only available to authenticated staff users and can host moderation, plan management and risk review tools.
